channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Remco Evenepoel secures sole leadership of Red Bull-Bora-Hansgrohe in Tour de France after mountain victory
item.description: Remco Evenepoel has solidified his position as the sole leader of the Red Bull-Bora-Hansgrohe team in the Tour de France after a dominant mountain stage victory. The Belgian cyclist's win on stage 15 ...

item.title: UPLIFT beneficiaries use cash aid for essential needs and home repairs
item.description: The UPLIFT cash aid program, expanded by the government, began distributing financial assistance to beneficiaries across the Philippines. Over 1,193 residents in Binangonan, Rizal, and around 43 in Mu...

item.title: Wildfire Evacuation Alert Issued for Kimberley, B.C., as Fire Threatens Residents
item.description: The entire city of Kimberley, British Columbia, has been placed on evacuation alert due to an out-of-control wildfire that has grown to nearly six square kilometers. Over 8,000 residents have been war...

item.title: Zhongji Innolight's Hong Kong IPO Approval Drives Share Price Increase
item.description: Zhongji Innolight, a Chinese optical transceivers company, experienced a significant share price surge following approval for a major Hong Kong listing valued at up to $8 billion. The deal is expected...

item.title: Israeli embassy criticizes Labor's draft platform on Israel-Gaza conflict
item.description: The Israeli embassy has intervened in Australian politics by criticizing Labor's draft platform on the Israel-Gaza conflict, which is set to be debated at the party's national conference. The embassy'...

item.title: Former Child Star Sipho 'Psyfo' Ngwenya Reflects on Career Highlights and Family Life
item.description: Sipho 'Psyfo' Ngwenya, a former child star who gained fame through YoTV and later starred in the drama series Generations, recently made a surprise return to television as part of The Masked Singer SA...

item.title: Kericho Residents Protest Development Neglect, Demand Infrastructure Improvements
item.description: A group of residents in Kericho County have publicly criticized President William Ruto's government for neglecting developmental projects in the region. They highlighted the stalled Karenga Airstrip p...

item.title: Why Most Businesses Fail: The Role of Poor Systems Over Marketing
item.description: The article explains that most African SMEs fail not because of poor marketing but due to weak operational systems. While many businesses focus on acquiring customers through advertising and social me...

item.title: German Broadcasters Mock Trump During World Cup Final as He Holds Trophy
item.description: President Donald Trump was handed the FIFA World Cup trophy during the final match between Spain and Argentina at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, on July 19, 2026. German broadcasters ...

item.title: Youth protests in Delhi demand resignation of education minister amid clashes with police
item.description: Thousands of young people took to the streets of central Delhi on Monday, demanding the resignation of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan. The protests, which led to widespread traffic disrup...

item.title: Former Liverpool and England Star Kevin Keegan Passes Away at 75
item.description: Kevin Keegan, a former Liverpool and England star, passed away at 75 after battling cancer. He was one of only four Englishmen to win the Ballon d’Or, a prestigious award. His career included three Pr...

item.title: Johannesburg Faces Ongoing Water Supply Challenges Following Maintenance Work
item.description: Johannesburg residents continue to grapple with water supply issues days after scheduled maintenance by Rand Water. The maintenance, which was planned from 7am to 7pm on July 17, left several reservoi...

item.title: President Hassan launches Sh6.31 trillion SGR project linking Tabora and Kigoma
item.description: President Hassan has initiated the construction of Tanzania's Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) sixth phase, connecting Tabora and Kigoma, with an investment of Sh6.31 trillion. The 506-kilometre project i...

item.title: Hong Kong Culinary Experience in Makati
item.description: The article highlights the opening of Kowloon Station, a new dining destination in Makati that brings the flavors of Hong Kong to the Philippines. This establishment offers a curated selection of dim ...

item.title: Ofcom investigates fairness and privacy concerns over Married at First Sight UK
item.description: The UK's communications regulator, Ofcom, has initiated an official investigation into the Channel 4 reality TV show 'Married at First Sight UK' following allegations of unfair treatment and privacy b...

item.title: Jackie Matubia and Ex-Husband Celebrate Daughter Zari's 11th Birthday with Intimate Backyard Gathering
item.description: Jackie Matubia, renowned Kenyan actress, celebrated her daughter Zari's 11th birthday with a low-key backyard gathering alongside her ex-husband Kennedy Njogu. The event, shaped entirely by Zari's pre...

item.title: No Winners in PCSO Major Lotto Draws on July 20, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for both the Grand Lotto 6/55 and Megalotto 6/45 jackpot prizes on Monday, July 20, 2026. The Grand Lotto 6/55 jac...

item.title: Sir Garfield Sobers: A Tribute to the Legendary All-Rounder
item.description: Sir Garfield Sobers, widely regarded as one of the greatest all-rounders in cricket history, has passed away at the age of 89, marking the end of an era for the sport. Tributes have flooded in from fa...

item.title: Kolkata Chai Collaborates with Bungalow Hospitality for Business Partnership
item.description: The article discusses the strategic partnership between Kolkata Chai, a renowned tea brand, and Bungalow Hospitality, a hospitality management company. The collaboration aims to expand their market re...

item.title: Jersey Mike's Sevaluates at $8 Billion Amid Competitive Restaurant Market
item.description: The Wall Street Journal reports that Jersey Mike's, a prominent pizza chain, has garnered significant attention for its projected valuation of $8 billion. This figure far exceeds the valuations of oth...
